title: Run Configuration Schema v6.2
description: Schema for configuring a v6.2 diagnostic run (Competing Hypotheses Protocol + Interaction Mode). Controls whether the pipeline asks the user questions or auto-executes based on prompt heuristics.

process_description.description: Free-text description of the industrial process

interaction_mode.description: Controls user interaction level: auto=no questions, auto-execute full pipeline; interactive=ask user when CRITICAL/HIGH unknowns exist (original behavior); minimal=only ask for CRITICAL unknowns, use heuristics for the rest

max_judge_iterations.description: v6.2: Max Judge→Diagnostician repair iterations per judge session

max_reviewer_iterations.description: v6.2: Max Reviewer repair cycles (each cycle re-runs Diagnostician+Judge+Reporter+Reviewer)

global_max_iterations.description: v6.2: Global cap — total re-diagnosis iterations across ALL repair loops
